mnemonics.title: Transformer Layers
mnemonics.content: EATEN: Embedding, Attention, Transformer block, Encoder, Normalization

mnemonics.title: Attention Formula
mnemonics.content: QKT (Query-Key Transpose) scaled by √d, then Softmax then Value

acronyms.usage: Refers to models with billions of parameters trained on massive text data
Pre-training approach using masked language modeling

visualTips.visualization: Imagine words in a sentence as people in a room, each talking to everyone else simultaneously

analogies.analogy: Like teaching a student to complete sentences by reading millions of books
